data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies decision-making in-app by limiting the number of choices presented to users.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizes button and element sizes for faster interactions based on Fitts’s law.
data.technical_spec: Accessible sizing and spacing for touch interfaces.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Designs interface to match user expectations from other platforms (e.g., Facebook).
data.technical_spec: Utilizes familiar UI patterns and navigation structures.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Segments content into chunks to help users better process and remember information.
data.technical_spec: Use of stories and carousel features.

data.title: Aesthetic Usability Effect
data.description: Maintains a visually appealing design to enhance perceived usability.
